vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

risk.desc: The harmonic drive mount may require additional support structures for overhangs to prevent material sagging during LPBF.
risk.mit: Add support structures as needed for the harmonic drive mount.

risk.desc: The base plate may need reinforcement to handle the peak torque of 100Nm.
risk.mit: Consider adding rib stiffeners or increasing the wall thickness of the base plate.

risk.desc: The cable entry grommet may need to be designed with a larger clearance to accommodate the harness strain relief.
risk.mit: Increase the clearance of the cable entry grommet to ensure proper strain relief.

risk.desc: The service window may not provide sufficient access for maintenance, potentially leading to increased downtime.
risk.mit: Optimize the service window design to ensure easy access to internal components.

risk.desc: The mounting hole pattern may need to be adjusted to ensure proper alignment with the mounting flange.
risk.mit: Review and adjust the mounting hole pattern to ensure proper alignment.

integration_opportunities.description: Optimize drive mount for harmonic drive installation
integration_opportunities.benefit: Improves alignment and reduces torque loss

integration_opportunities.description: Design service window for easy access to internal components

manufacturing_strategy.inspection: CMM for dimensional accuracy, visual inspection for surface finish

risk.desc: Risk of assembly misalignment due to lack of clear datum references.

risk.desc: Risk of fastener failure due to inadequate preload or locking method.
risk.mit: Specify and document proper preload and locking methods for all fasteners.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure due to insufficient ribbing and reinforcement.
risk.mit: Increase ribbing and reinforcement in critical load-bearing areas.

risk.desc: The cycloidal reducer may not meet the required cycle life due to wear and tear over 10,000 cycles.
risk.mit: Implement a wear-resistant coating or upgrade to a higher-grade reducer.

risk.desc: The encoder may not provide accurate position feedback if the signal transmission is compromised.
risk.mit: Use shielded cables and ensure proper grounding to protect the encoder signal.

risk.desc: The motor mount may not be able to handle the torque output if the fasteners are not properly preloaded.
risk.mit: Ensure all fasteners are torqued to the manufacturer's specifications.

risk.desc: The heat dissipation from the reducer may not be sufficient if the ambient temperature is high.
risk.mit: Add additional cooling fins or a heat sink to the reducer.

risk.desc: The service hatch may not provide adequate access for maintenance if the design is too restrictive.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the service hatch or add additional access points.
